headline: Palantir Secures Pentagon Maven Role As Valuation And Growth Debated
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) has had its Maven AI platform formally adopted by the U.S. Department of Defense as a Pentagon "program of record." This change embeds Maven AI as a permanent component of U.S. military infrastructure with recurring budget treatment across branches. Palantir has also secured new public sector work, including a significant trial with the UK Financial Conduct Authority and new alliances outside defense.
